data.name: Furry Lust
data.detailed_description:
A short arcade game featuring beautiful furry characters. With relaxing music and a cozy yet spicy atmosphere, it’s perfect for unwinding after a long day at work.

Features:

  • One-handed gameplay

  • Engaging mechanics

  • Full HD artwork

  • Soothing music

  • LGBTQ+ friendly

  • The ideal way to spend your night alone (or with family, if you’re feeling brave!)

  • A great gift for furry lovers and even haters—just to troll them

  • Art by @ZHADART

data.short_description: A delightful arcade game where you collect items to discover beautiful furry characters. Enjoy an amazing atmosphere, great music, and high-quality furry artwork—perfect for relaxing. Created with love by furry lovers, for furry lovers!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7, 8, 10
  • 處理器: anything from this millenium
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB RAM
  • 音效卡: potato
